On 19 October 2001 12:06, Maxim Sheyman wrote:
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Boot system on 686b + KT133A motherboard with 4.4-REALESE kernel

Please report version of your BIOS image. If it is below v.1004, then you 
need to upgrade it to at least v.1004.

Regards,
Alexey.
